title: zephyr: add SCHC ACK/MIC/DTag fragmentation semantics
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-9nrr.31 review. The generic SCHC fragmentation engine now emits and reassembles bounded ordered RuleID/W/FCN tile fragments, but ACK_ALWAYS and ACK_ON_ERROR currently share the No-ACK fragment wire format and there is no ACK bitmap generation/parsing, DTag field, or MIC carried/validated in All-1 fragments. Implement the remaining RFC 8724 fragmentation semantics needed for reliable LoRa operation: ACK request/response API, receiver bitmap state, retransmission hooks, DTag handling if used by the profile, and MIC generation/verification for complete packets. Add tests for missing tiles, ACK-on-error bitmap contents, retransmission, MIC mismatch rejection, and out-of-order fragments that should not complete without all prior tiles.
close_reason: Completed: implemented generic SCHC ACK-mode fragmentation support with DTag-aware fragment control, All-1 MIC generation/verification, receiver tile bitmap state, ACK encode/decode, and retransmission helper. Added native_sim ztests for DTag/MIC, missing-tile ACK bitmap contents, retransmission, MIC mismatch rejection and recovery, and All-1 not completing when prior tiles are missing. Tests: host cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Werror compile, git diff --check, and EC2 native_sim west build -b native_sim lichen/tests/schc_generic -t run passed 15/15. Review pass 1 found and fixed MIC-mismatch reassembler state poisoning. Review pass 2 found and fixed stale ACK-mode comment plus fixed-width ACK DTag/window packing. No follow-up Beads created.
